hero.title: Muhammet Saraç
hero.subtitle: Computer Engineering Student
hero.description: I like making digital products that people actually enjoy using. Full-stack work, user experience, solving problems - every day brings something new to learn.

about.title: About Me
about.erasmusDesc: During February 2025 – July 2025, I studied at the University of Maribor as part of the Erasmus program. I worked with C++ and 3D animation using OpenGL, and gained experience with Blender.
about.description: I am a Computer Engineering student at Pamukkale University. I am a responsible, adaptable person who is eager to learn. With my strong problem-solving skills and creative perspective, I enjoy being an efficient member of a team.
about.fullstack: I focus on backend-heavy full-stack development - building scalable APIs, database design, and end-to-end web applications.
about.devops: I am interested in Docker and DevOps practices, working on CI/CD pipelines, containerization, and infrastructure automation.
about.linux: I have experience with Linux system administration and shell scripting. I work on server configuration, security, and performance optimization.

thesis.label: Thesis Project
thesis.name: Adrenal Anomaly Detection System
thesis.desc: A clinical decision support system for detecting adrenal anomalies. NestJS backend with PostgreSQL and JWT authentication, paired with a React Native mobile application for MRI image analysis and AI-powered prediction.

hobby.label: Homelab
hobby.name: Raspberry Pi 5 Server
hobby.desc: A self-hosted infrastructure running on DietPi OS. Traefik reverse proxy with Cloudflare Tunnel, media stack (Jellyfin, Sonarr, Radarr, qBittorrent), Gitea for source control, Paperless-ngx for document management, and monitoring with Uptime Kuma.
